step1.title: Upload Product Image

step2.title: Configure Settings
step2.description: Choose target platform, generation quantity, and style preferences

step3.title: Generate Detail Page
step3.description: AI automatically generates high-quality product detail pages, download with one click

pricing.comparisonSubtitle: Detailed comparison of features across all plans

faq1.question: What happens when I run out of generation credits?
faq1.answer: Free users can wait for the monthly reset or upgrade to Pro/Enterprise. Paid users can purchase additional credit packs anytime.

faq2.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq2.answer: Yes, you can cancel anytime. You'll continue to have access to all features until the end of your billing period, then automatically downgrade to Free.

faq3.question: Can I use generated images commercially?
faq3.answer: Absolutely. You have full commercial rights to all generated images for any business purpose, including e-commerce and advertising.

faq4.question: Which e-commerce platforms are supported?
faq4.answer: We currently support Amazon, Shopify, and other major platforms. Enterprise plan also supports custom template sizes.
